spec_match.rationale: The demo perfectly showcases using light-dark() with different SVG background patterns as data URIs inside background-image.

interactive.rationale: Clean interactive buttons to toggle color-scheme (Auto, Force Light, Force Dark) which trigger native browser evaluation of light-dark().

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb matches the adaptive background concept perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates coordinate-free theme adjustment, simultaneously applying light-dark() to both background-image and background-color.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system, using standard colors and layout structures.

summary: An exceptionally clean and correct demo illustrating how light-dark() can swap background patterns dynamically based on color-scheme. Strong interactivity and spec adherence.
